## Migration / rollout impact

  - [ ] Runtime foundation / daemon core

  - [ ] STT runtime cutover

## Rollout gate / stop condition

Describe the gate this feature changes, the cutover it enables or blocks, and
the stop condition that must be satisfied before the next migration phase.

## Sequencing / dependency notes

List related issues, required ordering, or checklist items that should be
updated alongside this request.
